query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as date, count(*) as cnt, type FROM activities WHERE userId = 1 AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(createdAt), type ORDER BY DATE(createdAt)
